member.summary: MySQL/MariaDB-specific implementation of

member.summary: MySQL/MariaDB-specific implementation of

member.name: T:Intersect.Server.Database.PlayerData.MySqlPlayerContext
member.summary: MySQL/MariaDB-specific implementation of

member.name: F:Intersect.Server.Networking.LiteNetLib.ServerNetwork.Pool
member.summary: This is our smart thread pool which we use to handle packet processing and packet sending. Min/Max Number of Threads and Idle Timeouts are set via server config.

member.name: M:Intersect.Server.Notifications.Notification.CompilePatternHtmlTag
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\<[\\s\\n\\r]*html[^\\>]*>
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Multiline | RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match '<'.
○ Match a character in the set [\n\r\s] atomically any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character other than '>' atomically any number of times.
○ Match '>'.

member.name: M:Intersect.Server.Program.CreateHostBuilder(System.String[])
member.summary: Host builder method for Entity Framework Design Tools to use when generating migrations.

member.name: T:Intersect.Server.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Intersect.Server.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Intersect.Server.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:Intersect.Server.Web.Configuration.ApiConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration options for .

member.name: P:Intersect.Server.Web.Configuration.TokenGenerationOptions.AccessTokenLifetime
member.summary: Lifetime (in minutes) of access tokens (default is 5 minutes).

member.name: P:Intersect.Server.Web.Configuration.TokenGenerationOptions.RefreshTokenLifetime
member.summary: Lifetime (in minutes) of refresh tokens (default is 10080 minutes or 7 days).

member.name: M:Intersect.Server.Web.Controllers.Api.OAuthController.GrantTypeConverter.TitleCaseCharacterPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[A-Z]
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [A-Z].

member.name: M:Intersect.Server.Web.Controllers.Api.OAuthController.GrantTypeConverter.SnakeCaseCharacterPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:^|_)[a-z]
Explanation:
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match '_'.
○ Match a character in the set [a-z].

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CompilePatternHtmlTag_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the CompilePatternHtmlTag method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CompilePatternHtmlTag_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CompilePatternHtmlTag_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CompilePatternHtmlTag_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CompilePatternHtmlTag_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CompilePatternHtmlTag_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CompilePatternHtmlTag_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CompilePatternHtmlTag_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CompilePatternHtmlTag_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_80FEFFFF07
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".
